# kSecValuePersistentRef

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a persistent reference to the item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecValuePersistentRef: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData]. The bytes in this object can be stored by the caller and used on a subsequent invocation of the application (or even a different application) to retrieve the item referenced by it.
title: kSecValuePersistentRef
